title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Sanji, Big Mom, Chopper as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What in the world is that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your ship is just filled with monsters, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come and try me, big mom! At the very least, I can grab you and jump, taking you down to the depths with me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe! Run, run as far as you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We somehow made it this far, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And even though Sanji will be here any minute now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Even ocean water won't do a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One piece will be on break next week!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 21 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
